purpose.zh: 企业战略、认证/行业研究、管理层汇报。
purpose.en: Corporate strategy, certification or industry research, and executive reports.

style.zh: 高端咨询风，适合长期规划、产业分析和路线图表达。
style.en: High-end consulting style for long-range plans, industry analysis, and roadmap narratives.

templateStrength: Reusable style distilled from a finished PowerPoint deck.
